system_upgrade_history.upgrade_notes: Each upgrade documented in changelog; rollback tested for major releases.

incident_response.incident_logging: All incidents logged with timestamp, affected components, and resolution steps.
incident_response.response_protocol: Critical incidents trigger immediate operator notification and escalation workflow.

api_documentation.rest_endpoints: All REST API endpoints documented with request/response schemas and error codes.
api_documentation.sse_streams: SSE telemetry streams described with payload structure and reconnection logic.

ui_customization: Isolated ChaosMode components to src/_experimental/chaos/ and stripped imports from GodViewLayout.tsx.
Created ForensicsDock.tsx to wrap and synchronize SessionTimeLine and AxiomInspector.
Refactored MonitorContainer to await fetchReport() before connectSSE().
Implemented Blob-based patch export utility in RemedialManifold.
Audited UI components for semantic bleed-through and mapped all labels from backend JSON.
Integrated @viselect/vanilla for headless bulk selection in UnifiedLensExplorer.

compliance_audit_schedule.audit_frequency: Quarterly compliance audits scheduled; results reviewed by system architect.
compliance_audit_schedule.audit_tracking: Audit outcomes tracked in compliance log and improvement actions assigned.

community_engagement.open_source: Core scanner and middleware published under permissive license; contributions accepted via GitHub.
community_engagement.user_forum: Operators and architects can share feedback and best practices in community forum.

inter_service_communication.message_formats: JSON schemas for REST API, SSE payloads for telemetry, Redis pub/sub for scan metrics.
inter_service_communication.protocol_schemas: Frontend communicates via REST and SSE; middleware uses FastAPI contracts; worker receives CLI commands; Redis bus uses channel-based pub/sub.
inter_service_communication.error_propagation: Errors are surfaced via SSE status updates, REST error codes, and log aggregation. Middleware logs exceptions and forwards critical failures to UI.

security_audit_results.penetration_testing: External audit tools used; remediation actions tracked in issue log.

authentication_authorization.authentication: Session tokens for operator login; OAuth planned for V2.
authentication_authorization.authorization: Role-based access control for scan initiation, patch export, and audit review. Architect, Operator, Auditor roles defined.

operational_monitoring_alerting.monitoring_tools: System health tracked via Agent Pulse bar, scan progress via SSE, backend logs aggregated for failures.
operational_monitoring_alerting.alerting: Critical failures trigger UI alerts and backend log entries; operators notified via dashboard.
operational_monitoring_alerting.log_aggregation: Middleware and worker logs collected for audit and troubleshooting.

backup_recovery_procedures.backup_strategy: Scan results and governance policies backed up daily; Redis bus state snapshotted hourly.
backup_recovery_procedures.disaster_recovery: Restoration workflows documented; recovery tested quarterly.

third_party_integration_points.lm_studio: Integrated for AI pipeline via REST endpoint.
third_party_integration_points.ci_cd: Scan results and compliance status exported to CI/CD pipelines for automated review.
third_party_integration_points.external_audit_tools: Penetration testing and compliance validation integrated via API.

localization_internationalization.language_support: English supported; localization framework in place for future expansion.
localization_internationalization.translation_workflow: UI labels and reports structured for translation; locales managed via config.

data_privacy_compliance.privacy_policy: Scan data anonymized; sensitive information redacted in reports.
data_privacy_compliance.gdpr_ccpa: Compliance enforced; data retention and access controls documented.

resource_utilization_scaling.cpu_memory_metrics: Resource usage monitored during scans; scaling policies defined for high-load scenarios.
resource_utilization_scaling.scaling_strategy: Auto-scaling containers and load balancing planned for V2.

end_to_end_test_scenarios.test_flows: Full scan initiation, telemetry streaming, patch export, and compliance review tested end-to-end.
end_to_end_test_scenarios.acceptance_criteria: QA procedures validate scan accuracy, error handling, and UI responsiveness.

limitations: Network isolation required for worker nodes
edge_cases: Large repo scan may require manual chunking
Unusual directory structures may impact ignore heuristics

change_management_release_process.change_tracking: All changes tracked via version control and issue log.
change_management_release_process.review_workflow: Code reviews required for all releases; changelog maintained.
change_management_release_process.rollback_procedures: Rollback documented for critical failures; versioning enforced.

operator_training_documentation.documentation: User/operator guides and onboarding materials provided.
operator_training_documentation.training: Periodic training sessions for operators; documentation updated quarterly.

system_metrics_historical_analytics.trend_data: Historical analytics tracked for system usage and performance.

feedback_continuous_improvement.feedback_mechanism: Operators can submit feedback via dashboard; issues tracked in log.
feedback_continuous_improvement.continuous_improvement: Feedback reviewed monthly; improvement actions prioritized in roadmap.

error_handling_strategy.react_error_boundaries: Critical UI components (MonitorContainer, RemedialManifold, TelemetryChart, KEL components) wrapped in React Error Boundaries to catch localized failures and render degraded-state placeholders.
error_handling_strategy.middleware_logging: All exceptions and errors logged and surfaced to UI for operator review.
error_handling_strategy.scanner_audit: Scanner audited for accidental writes and temp files; exceptions surfaced to middleware.

versioning_upgrade_policy.contract_versioning: All API payloads and schemas include version fields. Frontend and backend validate contract versions before processing.
versioning_upgrade_policy.upgrade_process: Upgrades require audit of contract sync, SSRF/path traversal prevention, and volume management.

accessibility_ux_features.dark_mode: Low-latency, high-contrast design system optimized for ocular ergonomics in dark environments.
accessibility_ux_features.theme_tokens: Terminal Green, Critical Red, Amber mapped to security states.
accessibility_ux_features.animations: Custom pulse-slow animation for Agent Pulse, backdrop-blur for TelescopeModal.

deployment_environment_config.env_file: Centralized .env file for backbone connectivity, LM Studio integration, API routing, node identification, and scan mode.
deployment_environment_config.health_checks: redis-bus verified via redis-cli ping, middleware-hub via curl health probe.
deployment_environment_config.containerization: Each service containerized with dedicated build context and strict network isolation.

v2_features: Automated compliance policy updates via LLM
planned_audits: Performance optimization for bulk selection and telemetry hydration

rounds.description: Granular Component Analysis: Audit high-risk functions and classes.
Architectural Synthesis: Consolidate findings into system summary. Handles context size and stability warnings.
Next Steps: Generate prioritized remediation tasks.

ai_pipeline_logic.stability_handling: Handles client disconnects gracefully, allows automatic retries for context overflow.

scan_reduction_metrics.raw_files: Up to 65,000 files in target repo.
scan_reduction_metrics.reduced_files: Analysis volume reduced by up to 98% using Binary Guard heuristics and expanded ignore lists.
scan_reduction_metrics.final_scan: Typical scan yields 12,000 high-value files, 44 scanned in sample report.

integration_points.frontend_backend: SSE telemetry from /api/scan/status endpoint, REST API for scan results and patch export.
integration_points.middleware_worker: FastAPI Gateway triggers Directory_bundler_v4.5.py via secure subprocess, manages protocol formatting and job dispatch.
integration_points.scanner_governance: Loads rules/governance.yaml for compliance policy, updates from persistent registry.

data_flow_mapping.static_analysis: Target Codebase -> Scanner Core -> JSON Payload -> Bench Middleware -> REST API -> UI Binary Guard
data_flow_mapping.live_telemetry: Target Redis Bus -> Bench Middleware Proxy -> SSE Stream -> UI Monitor Container
data_flow_mapping.agentic_fix: UI Telescope -> Target File Context -> Bench Middleware -> LM Studio -> JSON Diff -> UI Remedial Manifold -> .patch Export

user_roles.architect: Oversees system state, validates compliance, reviews scan results and patch exports.
user_roles.operator: Monitors telemetry, triggers scans, reviews flagged issues, initiates remediation workflows.
user_roles.auditor: Reviews governance violations, compliance status, and system drift reports.

operational_constraints.immutability: System must not mutate target codebase directly; all fixes exported as .patch files for human review.
operational_constraints.isolation: Physics engine and worker nodes are sovereign and isolated from external access.
operational_constraints.compliance: UI must remain agnostic, strictly decoupled from physics logic, and maintain ISA-101 aesthetic.

analytics_reporting.scan_summary: Human-readable executive report generated for each scan, includes metrics, governance violations, and AI insights.
analytics_reporting.insights: AI-powered semantic insights highlight remediation actions and architectural risks.

technology_stack.frontend: Next.js (App Router), React, Tailwind CSS, Lucide React, Recharts
technology_stack.scanner: Python 3.10+, ast, PyYAML, LLM Client SDKs
technology_stack.infrastructure: Docker, Docker Compose, custom bridge network, .env synchronization

directory_structure.src/app: Root layout, SSE-managed Agent Pulse bar, God View entry point, custom theme tokens
directory_structure.src/components: BinaryGuardExplorer, monitor widgets, telescope modal, shared primitives
directory_structure.src/lib: Hooks (useTelemetryStream), constants (frontend mirror of bundler_constants.py), utils (entropy, AST complexity)
directory_structure.bench-middleware/app: main.py, routers (telemetry, agents), services (redis_service, dispatcher), models (schemas.py)

architectural_philosophy: Low-latency, high-fidelity observation deck (God View) for human-in-the-loop validation. 3 Axioms of Integrity: Traversal, Sanitization, Parsimony. ISA-101 Industrial HMI standard. Observer pattern for detached auditing.
compliance_enforcement: Governance decoupled via YAML-based rules. SecurityValidator logic enforced for all requests. SSRF prevention, path validation, extension whitelisting, and volume management implemented.
observer_pattern_rationale: Scanner operates as a detached auditor, validating compliance outside the production execution loop. Ensures objective static analysis and regulatory drift detection.

telemetry_state_management.useTelemetryStream: Manages EventSource connection, validates incoming JSON, prevents silent failure bugs, synchronizes telemetry under heavy load.
telemetry_state_management.Agent Pulse: Tracks health of 3-round AI pipeline, monitors LM Studio connection, provides real-time alerts for stability and memory usage.

rules.criteria: Strictly forbid: eval, exec, compile, subprocess, os.system, pickle.
Flag high-entropy strings (>4.5) in non-ignored zones.
Core modules must implement 'process_stream' in IRERProcessor.

governance_schema.policy: Governance-as-Code (GaC) enables auditors to update compliance standards without modifying core engine.

container_orchestration.network: Custom bridge (irer-internal) for isolation. Only UI and API gateways exposed. Worker and Redis are sequestered.
container_orchestration.volumes: Read-only mount for source code, irer_scans for scan persistence, redis_data for bus state persistence.

resilience_orchestration.startup_order: Strictly Ordered Startup: Redis first, then API Gateway, then UI and Worker nodes.
resilience_orchestration.health_checks: redis-bus via redis-cli ping, middleware-hub via curl -f http://localhost:8000/api/status (backend-hub Dockerfile must include curl).

blockers: UnifiedLensExplorer lacks bulk selection and has semantic bleed-through
architectural_gaps: Missing error boundaries in critical components

ChaosMode Isolation Failure.remediation: Move chaos components to _experimental/chaos and strip imports from GodViewLayout

Missing Forensics Dock.remediation: Create ForensicsDock.tsx to wrap and synchronize SessionTimeLine and AxiomInspector

MonitorContainer Hydration Race.remediation: Refactor MonitorContainer to await fetchReport() before connectSSE()

Semantic Bleed-Through.remediation: Audit UI and replace hardcoded strings with dynamic labels from backend JSON

test_coverage_error_handling.coverage_summary: Tests cover core logic, but gaps remain for new rules, edge cases, and error boundaries.
test_coverage_error_handling.error_boundary_audit: Critical components need React Error Boundaries; audit in progress.

contract_versioning_status.middleware_audit: Contract versioning and SSRF/path traversal prevention being enforced; audit ongoing.

security_volume_management.ssrf_prevention: Middleware validates LAN IP and restricts origins; audit ongoing.
security_volume_management.volume_management: Read-only mounts enforced; scanner immutability audit in progress.

performance_metrics.bulk_selection_speed: Not optimized; headless DOM selection pending
performance_metrics.sse_hydration_latency: Race condition detected; refactor in progress
performance_metrics.ui_responsiveness: Generally high, but bottlenecks in UnifiedLensExplorer

audit_results.exit_code_validation: Middleware and CLI exit code validation in progress

system_overview.name: IRER Validation Workbench & Remedial Manifold
system_overview.mission: Agnostic cyber-physical interrogation of spacetime-density simulations and autonomous code profiling.
system_overview.design_philosophy: ISA-101 Industrial HMI, Read-Only Observer, Cyber-Physical Telemetry
system_overview.primary_directive: Monitor the IRER-V14 JAX Physics Engine for topological drift and numerical instability without mutating the runtime environment.

flags.action: Create wrapper for timeline and axiom inspector
Remove static strings, map to backend

architecture_layers.role: SSE telemetry proxy, API gateway, router for AI services
AST parsing, drift detection, governance enforcement
Semantic vector search, bug/remedy matching, triage routing
Isolate Test Bench, mount target as read-only

telemetry_stream.payload: { h_norm: float, rho_max: float, step_count: int, instability_flag: 'URGENT' | null }

kel_query.response: { fix_code: string, similarity: float, is_golden: boolean }

rules_of_engagement: NEVER hardcode physics terminology in the UI. Read from backend payloads.
NEVER modify the Target System's code directly. Offer .patch files for human review.
ALWAYS maintain the ISA-101 gray-scale low-latency aesthetic in the UI.
DO NOT mix experimental 3D/Canvas rendering into the production DOM tree.
UI must remain strictly decoupled from IRER-V14 physics logic.
System is an Observer. Fixes proposed by AI must be exported as .patch files. System MUST NOT directly mutate the target irer-v14 source code.
Address flagged issues before implementing new features.

data_flow_map.Static_Analysis: Target Codebase -> Scanner Core -> JSON Payload -> Bench Middleware -> REST API -> UI Binary Guard
data_flow_map.Live_Telemetry: Target Redis Bus -> Bench Middleware Proxy -> SSE Stream -> UI Monitor Container
data_flow_map.Agentic_Fix: UI Telescope -> Target File Context -> Bench Middleware -> LM Studio -> JSON Diff -> UI Remedial Manifold -> .patch Export

implementation_issues.title: Chaos Mode Isolation Failure
implementation_issues.description: Experimental heavy 3D visualizations are present in the main production path, risking browser context window saturation and violating the V1 isolation mandate.
implementation_issues.action_required: Move src/components/chaos/* to src/_experimental/chaos/ and strip imports from GodViewLayout.tsx.

implementation_issues.title: Missing Forensics Dock
implementation_issues.description: SessionTimeLine and AxiomInspector exist independently and lack orchestration. Time and truth can drift, breaking epistemic correctness.
implementation_issues.action_required: Create ForensicsDock.tsx to wrap and synchronize SessionTimeLine and AxiomInspector. Mount it in the bottom grid row of GodViewLayout.

implementation_issues.title: Hydration vs. Live Stream Race Condition
implementation_issues.description: MonitorContainer connects to the live SSE telemetry stream before establishing the historical baseline, causing timeline pop-in and missing markers.
implementation_issues.action_required: Refactor MonitorContainer to await fetchReport() (historical baseline) before calling connectSSE().

implementation_issues.title: Missing Patch Export Functionality
implementation_issues.description: The system lacks the frontend implementation to generate a downloadable .patch artifact from the backend unified diff string.
implementation_issues.action_required: Add a utility function in RemedialManifold using new Blob([patchData], { type: 'text/x-patch' }) and a hidden <a> tag to trigger the browser download.

implementation_issues.title: Semantic Bleed-Through
implementation_issues.description: The UI contains hardcoded physics engine jargon (e.g., 'jax.lax.scan missing init state') instead of remaining strictly agnostic and relying on backend payloads.
implementation_issues.action_required: Audit UI components and replace hardcoded string descriptions with dynamic variables like axiom.message and event.description mapped from the JSON contracts.

implementation_issues.title: Lack of Headless Bulk Selection
implementation_issues.description: UnifiedLensExplorer does not currently utilize headless DOM selection, risking React fiber tree locking during bulk selection of friction points.
implementation_issues.action_required: Integrate '@viselect/vanilla' inside a useRef hook within UnifiedLensExplorer to handle bounding-box selection outside of the React lifecycle.

error_boundaries.strategy: Wrap MonitorContainer and RemedialManifold in React Error Boundaries to catch localized network/stream failures and render degraded-state placeholders.

patch_export_ux.description: Frontend must implement Blob-based download utility triggered by the 'Export Patch' button to generate a downloadable .patch file.
patch_export_ux.implementation: Use new Blob([patchData], { type: 'text/x-patch' }) and a hidden <a> tag to trigger download.

bulk_selection_performance.description: UnifiedLensExplorer must use headless DOM selection (@viselect/vanilla) to prevent React fiber locking during bulk selection.
bulk_selection_performance.implementation: Integrate @viselect/vanilla inside a useRef hook within UnifiedLensExplorer.

visual_enhancements.aurora_shaders: Optional GPU-accelerated fragment shaders for TelemetryChart to offload CPU and enhance ambient telemetry visuals.

synchronization_logic.forensics_dock: ForensicsDock must synchronize timeline and axiom state, ensuring causality mapping and epistemic correctness.
synchronization_logic.details: SessionTimeLine and AxiomInspector should share a unified state container. Timeline scrub actions must update axiom state, and axiom validation should reference the current timeline context. This prevents time-truth drift and ensures operator can map axiom failures to simulation timeframes.

contract_versioning_security.notes: Ensure data contracts are versioned and in sync across frontend, middleware, and backend. Enforce SSRF/path traversal prevention, volume management, and immutable scanning.
contract_versioning_security.versioning: All API payloads and schemas must include version fields. Frontend and backend must validate contract versions before processing.
contract_versioning_security.security: Middleware must validate all incoming paths, prevent SSRF, and ensure volume mounts are read-only. Scanner must audit for accidental writes and temp files.

test_coverage_error_handling.requirements: Expand test coverage for new rules and edge cases. Audit integration hooks and error handling to ensure all exceptions are logged and surfaced.
test_coverage_error_handling.integration_hooks: CLI/subprocess calls must return correct exit codes and surface all exceptions to middleware.
test_coverage_error_handling.logging: All exceptions and errors must be logged and surfaced to the UI for operator review.
test_coverage_error_handling.coverage: Tests must cover new rules, edge cases, and error boundaries.

Create ForensicsDock.tsx to wrap and synchronize SessionTimeLine and AxiomInspector.
Refactor MonitorContainer to await fetchReport() before connectSSE().
Implement Blob-based patch export utility in RemedialManifold.
Audit UI components for semantic bleed-through and map all labels from backend JSON.
Integrate @viselect/vanilla for headless bulk selection in UnifiedLensExplorer.
Wrap MonitorContainer, RemedialManifold, TelemetryChart, and KEL components in React Error Boundaries.
Expand test coverage for new rules, edge cases, and error boundaries.
Ensure contract versioning and SSRF/path traversal prevention in middleware.
Audit scanner for accidental writes and temp files.
Validate CLI/subprocess exit codes and error surfacing.
Implement Aurora shader integration for TelemetryChart (optional, V2).
Wrap critical components in React Error Boundaries.
Expand test coverage and audit error handling.
Ensure contract versioning and SSRF/path traversal prevention in middleware.
Audit scanner for accidental writes and temp files.
Validate CLI/subprocess exit codes and error surfacing.
